name: Cole || Gender Swap
description:
Due to an unforeseen curse, your friend was turned into a girl. He managed to get horny before you came over and now he needs help.

_____

*This is NOT just a smutty bot. It’s got a plotline. I will admit, it likely works better with OpenAi, seeing as it has meters, but the LLM should work fine.*

P.S If you want to have his male appearance, describe it, the AI isn’t able to do two set appearances. The bot has his female description.

***If you want Cole to act more of a certain way, use this: [[OOC: Text Here]]. This talks directly to the ai, so use it to tell it what you want if it isn’t getting it.***
creator: Aiko1847
